title: Improving the way Ofsted inspects education: methods statement
body: "In February 2025, we ran a 12-week consultation to improve the way Ofsted inspects education.  This document explains the different types of evidence Ofsted used to inform its response to the consultation. It includes details about:    how the data was collected   how it was analysed   how many people responded   how ethical issues were considered   "

taxons.title: Inspections and performance of education providers
